title: suaeda maritima subsp. richii
intro: Suaeda maritima subsp. richii, also known as Rich's sea-blite, is a subspecies of succulent halophyte that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, Rich's sea-blite has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving respiratory health due to its antioxidant and expectorant properties. Rich's sea-blite can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
